items.title: NCAA to expand March Madness men's and women's college basketball tournaments to 76 teams in 2027
items.summary: Sources told CBS Sports that the long-discussed addition of more teams in the NCAA men's and women's tournaments will begin next March
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: A record-breaking semi-final - the antidote to modern football?
items.summary: A scintillating semi-final first leg between Paris St-Germain and Bayern Munich left many to wonder if this was the antidote to modern football.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Sabalenka’s Madrid Open defence ends with shock defeat by 30th seed Baptiste
items.summary: American stuns world No 1 with 2-6, 6-2, 7-6 (6) victory Sinner beats Norrie 6-2, 7-5 and calls for schedule change Hailey Baptiste ended Aryna Sabalenka’s title defence in Madr...
